common.mockBanner: Demo mode — simulated data (backend not connected)
common.resetConfirm: This will erase all demo data created locally (subscriptions, payments, users, guides...) and restore the initial dataset. Continue?

auth.staffSpaceDesc: Supervisor, Manager, Operator, Guide, IT Admin
auth.pilgrimSpaceDesc: Track your file with ID/Passport and phone
auth.encadreurSpaceDesc: Track your group and the pilgrims you guide
auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired, please sign in again

errors.duplicate: Duplicate detected: this ID/Passport is already registered for the {{season}} season
errors.encadreurRequired: Please select a guide from the official list

dashboard.title: Dashboard — Reporting
dashboard.subtitle: Islamic Window Management
dashboard.insufficientBalanceAlert: {{count}} pilgrim(s) with an insufficient balance for a full pilgrimage

visa.pilgrimLoginSubtitle: Sign in with your ID/Passport and your phone number
visa.notFound: No file found with this information

paymentPage.title: Make a payment
paymentPage.paymentCodeHelp: Show this code at your branch to make a payment at the counter.
paymentPage.receiptUpload: Photo or scan of the receipt (optional)
paymentPage.receiptUploadHelp: Image or PDF format, 1.5 MB maximum. Helps the branch verify.
paymentPage.scanCta: Paper slip with a QR code?
paymentPage.scanCtaHelp: Scan the QR code printed on your payment slip to auto-fill the branch, reference and amount. Manual entry is always available.
paymentPage.scanHelp: Frame the slip's QR code in the camera.
paymentPage.scanSuccess: QR code read successfully — fields filled automatically.
paymentPage.pendingNotice: Your payment has been recorded and is awaiting verification by the bank.
paymentPage.complete: The target amount has been reached. Thank you!
paymentPage.incompleteNotice: Your file is not complete yet.

errors.amountTooHigh: The amount exceeds the remaining balance
errors.agencyRefRequired: Please select the branch and enter the slip reference
errors.mobileRefRequired: Please enter the Mobile Money transaction reference
errors.receiptTooLarge: The file exceeds 1.5 MB. Please choose a smaller file.
errors.qrInvalid: This QR code does not match the expected payment slip format.
errors.cameraUnavailable: Unable to access the camera. Check permissions or enter the information manually.

paymentValidation.title: Payment validation
paymentValidation.subtitle: Check the reference and amount before validating a payment
paymentValidation.singleDayHelp: Use the 4th field to filter on a single day (from = to = chosen date), or the first two fields for a period.

errors.referenceAlreadyUsed: The reference "{{reference}}" has already been validated on another payment. A reference can only be used once.

adminEncadreurs.title: Guide management
adminEncadreurs.subtitle: Guide directory by region
adminEncadreurs.name: Guide's name
adminEncadreurs.codeHelp: 3-character alphanumeric code identifying the guide — leave blank for automatic generation. It appears in the payment code given to the pilgrim.
adminEncadreurs.importHelp: Expected columns: "name" (guide's name), "region" and "code" (optional, 3 characters). Duplicates (same name) are ignored.

errors.invalidCode: The code must be exactly 3 alphanumeric characters.
errors.codeTaken: This code is already used by another guide.

adminUsers.title: User management
adminUsers.subtitle: Create and administer staff / management accounts
adminUsers.name: Full name

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: List of pilgrims and their file status
clients.biCheckHelp: Detects fully paid files that are still pending, and payments awaiting validation for more than 3 days.

anomalyReasons.FULLY_PAID_STILL_PENDING: fully paid file but still pending
anomalyReasons.PAYMENT_PENDING_TOO_LONG: payment awaiting validation for more than 3 days

clients.importHelp: Expected columns: "idNumber" (ID/Passport), "status" and "note" (optional). Useful for syncing statuses received from an external system.

powerBi.title: Power BI connector
powerBi.subtitle: Check the validation status of operations and export the dataset for Power BI
powerBi.exportHelp: Generates an Excel file detailing each payment (reference, method, amount, validation status) ready to import into Power BI Desktop.
powerBi.howToTitle: How to load this data into Power BI
powerBi.step1: In Power BI Desktop: Home → Get Data → Excel workbook.
powerBi.step2: Select the file exported above and the "Versements" sheet.
powerBi.step3: Build your visuals (validated/pending amounts, by guide, by region, etc.) then refresh the workbook after each new export.
powerBi.futureNote: Once the Spring Boot backend is connected, a live feed (OData/REST API) will replace this manual export for automatic refresh in Power BI.

adminSeasons.title: Hadj season management
adminSeasons.subtitle: Create a season and set the official amount per pilgrim type
